words.definition: A category of art, music, or writing defined by a shared style or theme
words.example: Mystery is her favourite literary genre.

words.definition: Watching or listening to digital media online without downloading it
words.example: I watched the whole documentary series streaming on my phone.

words.definition: A book, film, or show that continues the story of an earlier one
words.example: The sequel was even more exciting than the original film.

words.definition: The recorded music that accompanies a film or television show
words.example: The movie's powerful soundtrack won three international awards.

words.definition: An arrangement to pay regularly in exchange for a service or publication
words.example: I have a monthly subscription to a popular music streaming platform.

words.definition: The first public showing or performance of a film or theatrical work
words.example: The film's glamorous premiere was held in Los Angeles.

words.definition: The sequence of events that make up the main story of a book or film
words.example: The plot of the novel was full of surprising twists.

words.definition: The complete group of actors appearing in a film, play, or show
words.example: The film has an incredible cast of internationally famous actors.

words.definition: A short promotional preview of a film or television series
words.example: Have you seen the trailer for the new superhero film yet?

words.definition: A film or TV programme that presents facts about real events or people
words.example: The documentary explores the long-term impact of climate change.

words.definition: To watch multiple episodes of a series one after another in a single sitting
words.example: I binge-watched the entire first season over the weekend.

words.definition: The main character of a story, film, or play
words.example: The protagonist faces many moral dilemmas throughout the story.

words.definition: Praised enthusiastically and widely by critics and audiences
words.example: The director's latest film has been widely acclaimed by critics.

words.definition: A short break between the acts or parts of a live performance
words.example: The play had a twenty-minute intermission between the two acts.

words.definition: A sentimental longing for the past, especially a happier time
words.example: The film evokes a strong sense of nostalgia for the 1980s.
